panels.title: Trace Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
panels.description: Open Jaeger Explore to search traces by service/operation

panels.title: Services
panels.description: Navigate to Explore → VictoriaTraces to search traces

options.content:
## VictoriaTraces

Traces are collected via OpenTelemetry Collector from your application services.

### How to explore traces:
1. Go to **Explore** → Select **VictoriaTraces** datasource
2. Select a **Service** from the dropdown
3. Optionally filter by **Operation**, **Duration**, or **Tags**
4. Click a trace to see the flame graph

### Useful queries:
- Find slow traces: set Min Duration to `500ms`
- Find error traces: check **Tags** for `error=true`
- Find traces by trace ID: paste ID in the search field

## Trace to Logs

When viewing a trace in the Jaeger datasource, you can click on a span and navigate directly to related logs in VictoriaLogs.

This works automatically because the Grafana datasource provisioning includes `tracesToLogsV2` configuration linking VictoriaTraces → VictoriaLogs.
